fields.helpText: This field contains a station type. Valid station type are numbers between '10' and '99'.
This field contains the station type name.

This multiple is no longer in use and has been starred for deletion. It will be removed in a future release of the PIMS (MAS) package. Previously, this multiple contained the suffixes assigned to various stations or facilities.  It has been replaced by the Suffix Ptr field (#.01) of the Suffix Ptr multiple (#45.813) which is a pointer to the Facility Suffix file (#45.68).  The Facility Suffix file is a table file which contains the suffixes, effective date(s), and active/inactive flag(s).
